case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. YONGSHENG ZHANG

Failure to appear for future matters may be subject to dismissal per Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: RAYMOND K. WONG; Proceedings not reported. (610)
